title: [security] schnorr48_pubkey_valid not constant-time
description: schnorr48_pubkey_valid() early-returns on first crypto_verify32 match in loop over 8 low-order points (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:199). Introduces timing side-channel for invalid pubkeys (focus area: crypto timing, MIC verification). Rust side uses full constant-time checks. Recommend accumulator OR of all verifies or constant-time select. Reviewed last 20 commits (mostly bd:auto + worker fixes to schnorr48.c/h, lichen_link_rx.c, coap_client.c); this was introduced in project-LICHEN-562i and 5c4b28967. No other OSCORE/EDHOC/key-zeroing issues found in recent changes.
close_reason: Constant-time schnorr48_pubkey_valid using OR accumulator for all 8 low-order points (replaces early-return). Matches Rust impl and test vectors. Verified via test vectors in lichen/tests/schnorr48. lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:197
